[Congressional Bills 103th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 187 Engrossed in House (EH)]

H. Res. 187

                In the House of Representatives, U. S.,

                                                          May 27, 1993.
    Resolved, That the following named Members be, and they are hereby, elected 
to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Agriculture: Mr. Smith, Michigan; and Mr. Everett, Alabama.
    Committee on Merchant Marine and Fisheries: Mrs. Bentley, Maryland; Mr. 
Taylor, North Carolina; and Mr. Torkildsen, Massachusetts.
    Committee on Veterans Affairs: Mr. Stearns, Florida; and Mr. King, New York.
            Attest:






                                                                          Clerk.
